texto: Autism: The Happy Kingdom is an exceptional book full of fantasy and play. It provides us with a crucial message presented in such a sweet and magical way. You will fall in love with the King, Queen, Prince and Princess and be delighted to discover how adorable they are even if they have unusual behaviors. This story has been written to raise awareness about autism, however, it is a message that applies to everyone and should be read by all.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stephanie Anast sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Autism: The Happy Kingdom is an exceptional book full of fantasy and play. It provides us with a …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, children-s-books, motherhood, útil em momentos de motherhood e parenting-advice.
